svg.text: Case Utilisation of Eligibility Data — ER Proposal
newUM V1 · Sprint 26.04.14 · #187416 (Carlos) · Miro ER Update Draft
6 Sequential Rules — Any FAIL → Out of Scope
PostgreSQL OLTP (same DB as Eligibility) — each box = 1 table
Snapshot cols: MemberId, DOB, SSN, LOB, CovStart/End,
FK: EligVersionId + CaseId | Dual eligible = 2 rows |
FK: CaseId | Cols: POSCode VARCHAR(2), POSDescription
LOB + effective date → Benefit Type + PA
LOB + Product Line + Billing Method + Dx
Reads Elig: FirstName, LastName, DOB, SSN,
